mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate compresses the discount rate applied to future corporate cash flows, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the subsequent month.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline.

mechanism_narrative: Rapid deterioration in the unemployment rate signals impending recession risk, triggering risk-off equity repricing and negative forward returns over the next week.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20-day forward returns in more than 60% of triggered instances despite the unemployment trigger firing.

mechanism_narrative: Joint strength in housing starts and consumer credit expansion indicates robust aggregate demand, supporting corporate earnings growth and positive equity returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: Rank IC remains below 0.05 over any 3-year rolling window, or the joint signal fails to predict positive returns in more than 55% of out-of-sample instances.

mechanism_narrative: Industrial production contraction signals supply-side bottlenecks or demand weakness, depressing forward equity returns as corporate margins face compression.
failure_condition: Forward returns remain positive despite INDPRO contraction, or the signal shows no predictive power over a 5-year walk-forward test.

mechanism_narrative: Sequential quarterly GDP growth accelerations directly correlate with upward revisions to corporate earnings forecasts, driving positive short-term equity returns.
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns show no significant positive correlation with GDP growth surprises across a 10-year sample period.

mechanism_narrative: Sustained inflation above target forces aggressive monetary tightening, increasing discount rates and compressing equity valuations over the subsequent quarter.
failure_condition: Equity valuations expand despite inflation breaching 3.0%, or forward returns are not significantly negative when the trigger activates.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous payroll growth and declining unemployment confirm a healthy labor market, reducing recession probabilities and supporting equity risk premiums.
failure_condition: Joint signal fails to predict positive returns in more than 50% of out-of-sample instances, or Rank IC drops below 0.04 over a 3-year window.

mechanism_narrative: Rapid deceleration in consumer credit growth signals household deleveraging, which historically precedes equity drawdowns during credit cycle peaks.
failure_condition: SPX forward returns are not significantly negative when credit growth decelerates, or the signal produces false breakouts in more than 40% of cases.
